recommendations.title: Asterix & Obelix: Mission Cleopatra
recommendations.overview: History's favorite Gauls assist Queen Cleopatra when she wagers that the Egyptian people can build a palace for Julius Caesar in just three months.

recommendations.title: Didier

recommendations.title: Christmas & Co.

recommendations.title: Pocahontas
recommendations.overview: Pocahontas, daughter of a Native American tribe chief, falls in love with an English soldier as colonists invade 17th century Virginia.

recommendations.title: HOUBA! On the Trail of the Marsupilami

recommendations.title: Cannibal Ferox
recommendations.overview: Three friends out to disprove cannibalism meet two men on the run who tortured and enslaved a cannibal tribe to find emeralds, and now the tribe is out for revenge.

recommendations.title: Quest for Fire
recommendations.overview: In the prehistoric world, a Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge to start a new fire, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest for more. With the tribe's future at stake, th

recommendations.title: Caveman

recommendations.title: Tresor
